message:
feat(tests): add T5.9 end-to-end reference services (46 tests)

Proves asupersync web + gRPC stack is usable without Tokio ecosystem
dependencies through realistic service scenarios covering REST CRUD,
middleware chains, gRPC health/reflection/interceptors, server lifecycle
shutdown phases, gRPC-Web protocol bridging, failure recovery, and
structured log correlation/redaction gates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
